name: Helios
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Helios charioteer of hours — the day set to music of hooves.
flowText: Helios charioteer of hours — the day set to music of hooves.

related.name: Apollo
related.teaser: Apollo is a crown that unifies — Sun disk; under Sun; in Leo; with XIX The Sun.

related.name: ☉ Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is the eternal lamp — source of clarity, fire of spirit, nobility of heart.

related.name: Citrine
related.teaser: Solar fire is the sovereign flame—the courage to act and become.

related.name: XIX. The Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is pure illumination — radiant joy and vital force shining clarity into all things.

related.name: Ouranos
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: Metatron
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: 👑 Crown (Sahasrara)
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Sophia
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: ♌ Leo
related.teaser: Leo is the lion’s flame — crown of fire, creative will, sovereign radiance.

related.name: Diamond
related.teaser: Crown is the open sky—pure presence pervading all forms.

related.name: Bragi
related.teaser: Bragi embodies sun, clarity, arts, prophecy — under Sun; in Leo.
